commentary: Proud to wrap another monthly Heartland Free Dental Clinic Saturday. Free preventive care across Wayne County is the kind of work that compounds.
Twelve continuing-ed credits in the books toward the April renewal cycle. RDH license renewal is a checkpoint, not a chore.

Catching up with the team at Lakewood Family Dentistry this week — proud of the new patient education flow we rolled out for periodontal assessments. Small structural change, big patient-comfort win. 🦷
Mentoring sync with Dr. Kim wrapped — talking through the patient education zine's next iteration. Clinical communication is a craft you keep refining. ✍️
Heartland's WordPress donation form is back online after the deploy. The little wins keep the lights on.
Proud to wrap another monthly Heartland Free Dental Clinic Saturday. Free preventive care across Wayne County is the kind of work that compounds.
Twelve continuing-ed credits in the books toward the April renewal cycle. RDH license renewal is a checkpoint, not a chore.
Patient-education zine v3 went to print. Page two finally lands.
The thing I tell every new patient: brushing is the warm-up; flossing is the main lift.
Heartland Free Dental Clinic donor newsletter is in proof. The volunteer Saturdays we coordinate make this organization run — proud to help shape the message. 📰
Proud to wrap another monthly Heartland Free Dental Clinic Saturday. Free preventive care across Wayne County is the kind of work that compounds.
Spent Saturday morning on Heartland WordPress maintenance — donation form smoke-tested. Open-source CMS care is the kind of work nobody sees and everyone benefits from. 🛠️
Patient-education zine v3 went to print. Page two finally lands.
The thing I tell every new patient: brushing is the warm-up; flossing is the main lift.
Heartland's WordPress donation form is back online after the deploy. The little wins keep the lights on.
Jake's Ann Arbor weekend. Tyler's textbook list scanned; the linguistics one is on backorder.
